message: Performance goal created with evaluator contract
Emitted model-facing Codex goal handoff; shell command did not mutate Codex goal state

evidence: Implemented Phase 2 semantic vector consistency: LanceSemanticStore rows now include symbolName and generation, search fails closed without resolved scope, upsertChunks deletes old vectors by projectId+filePath before add, deleteFile supports incremental vector deletion, HybridRetriever and RepoIndexer degrade when semantic storage is unavailable so graph/keyword retrieval still works. Regression tests cover delete-before-upsert, deleted-vector suppression, project isolation, and missing semantic store fallback. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.

Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build. Completion audit: LanceSemanticStore uses projectId+filePath delete-before-upsert, rows carry symbolName and generation metadata, search is project-scoped/fail-closed, deleteFile removes single-file vectors, and graph/keyword indexing/search degrade when semantic storage is unavailable. Tests cover delete-before-upsert, deleted-vector suppression, project isolation, and missing semantic fallback.
